# UI Handoff — sales-workbench

> Generated by figma-ui-handoff@0.1.0 at <ISO8601>
> Purpose: upstream design/product handoff, not implementation spec

## Summary

| Area | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Figma selection | needs-review | selection must include full page and missing states |
| Text characters | needs-review | confirm text `characters`, not only `node.name` |
| Component naming | needs-review | metric-card template / instance relation needs marking |
| Repeat groups | needs-review | repeated metric cards need template hints |
| States | missing | loading / empty / error / permission are not fully covered |
| Assets | needs-review | chart-empty source is unknown |

## Required Figma Selection

| Requirement | Current Evidence | Required Action |
|---|---|---|
| Full page selection | 后台销售工作台 root exists | Confirm selection includes full page and all state variants |

## Text Requirements

| Text / Area | Current Evidence | Required Action |
|---|---|---|
| Metric labels | Some text may rely on `node.name` | Confirm final text `characters` for all metric cards |

## Component / Section Naming Rules

| Area | Current Name | Recommended Name / Rule |
|---|---|---|
| Metric cards | metric-card repeated pattern | Mark one template and each instance clearly |

## Repeat Group Hints

| Pattern | Current Evidence | Required Action |
|---|---|---|
| metric-card | 多个指标卡视觉结构一致 | 标注 template / instance 关系 |

## State Coverage

| State | Current Evidence | Required Action |
|---|---|---|
| loading | missing | Provide loading state |
| empty | missing | Provide empty state |
| error | missing | Provide error state |
| permission | unclear | Confirm whether permission state is required |

## Asset Marking

| Asset | Current Evidence | Required Action |
|---|---|---|
| chart-empty | source unknown | 标注来源、格式和是否需要导出 |

## Design Diff Follow-up

| Change | Impact | Required Action |
|---|---|---|
| 新增指标卡 | May affect API/UI binding | Confirm copy, field binding and state coverage |

## Known Gaps

- [ ] loading / empty / error / permission 状态未完整出现。
- [ ] 新增指标卡应绑定哪个后端字段。
- [ ] `chart-empty` 是设计资源还是业务 CDN 图片。
- [ ] 设计/产品确认新增指标卡是否进入本期范围。

## Non-Goals

- This document does not modify Figma.
- This document is not an implementation spec.
- This document does not authorize coding.
